# The staging database on Tuesday needed a manual VACUUM before the demo

**Type:** lesson - **Proposed destination:** `Heuristics/Lessons-Learned.md`
**Evidence:** one specific troubleshooting exchange fixing slow queries on a specific staging instance before a specific demo.

A one-off operational detail tied to a single environment on a single day,
with no generalizable rule extracted (no mention of why it happens, when to
expect it again, or what pattern to watch for next time). Pure incident log,
not reusable knowledge.

**Why it might NOT get in:** too specific to one moment, no durable pattern behind it.

*Generated by the daily distiller. Gate: judge decides destination or discard.*
